sessions.summary: Overnight orchestration: 5-system concurrent loop (swarm, pulse, evolution, health, living layers). Dispatched 14 tasks across fleet. Evolution cycle proposed 3 mutations, 1 promoted.
Parallel orchestration with Claude conductor. Handled code-heavy tasks: test suite expansion, lint fixes, module refactoring. Codex subprocess routing.
S2+S3 coordination cycle. Stigmergy mark consolidation, pheromone decay sweep, hot-path identification. 6 high-salience paths flagged.
R_V paper COLM prep: verified all 100 claims against experimental data. Cross-checked Hedges' g=-1.47, AUROC=0.909, causal validation at L27. Updated v007 figures.
Memory hygiene pass: pruned 47 stale stigmergy marks, consolidated agent memory files, updated manifest checksums.
Sporadic audit: sampled 3 recent agent outputs for telos alignment. All passed gate checks. Logged witness attestation.
Semantic evolution pipeline: phase 3 (harden) completed for ontology.py. 6 mutation candidates scored. Top 2 applied. 47 new tests added.
Jagat Kalyan partner research: scored 33 organizations against welfare-ton alignment. Top 5: Eden Reforestation, Carbon Direct, Pachama, Nori, Microsoft Carbon Removal.
Extended overnight: self-replication architecture build. Designed agent spawning protocol, tested canary deployment pipeline. 12 tasks dispatched, 2 failed on auth.
Code generation sprint: scaffold TPP integration points, write 44 new tests for tpp.py module. All passing.
Graph Nexus architecture design: unified 6 existing graphs, designed Bridge Layer, spec'd Telos Graph schema. Output: SYNTHESIS.md + 4 module stubs.
Stigmergy hot-path scan: conductor:conductor_codex path hit 12 marks in 6h. Flagged for investigation. Pheromone reinforcement on 5 active paths.
Anthropic Fellows application draft. Framed R_V + dharma_swarm as mechanistic interpretability contribution. Aligned with Economic Futures grant narrative.
Deep archive: rotated JIKOKU_LOG (43K lines), created pre-rotation backup, compressed old session transcripts. Freed 180MB.
Quick audit: strategist grant output reviewed for telos alignment. Flagged one claim as unverified (JK welfare-tons projection). Logged.
Bistable attractor analysis at L27: 117.8% overshoot confirms two stable states in self-referential processing. Drafted supplementary figure for COLM.
Lodestone system build: wired Graph Nexus (6 modules), Lodestone library (7 files), Deep Reading Daemon. Director curated feed + telos gradient. Full integration test passed.
Auth failure on OpenRouter API key resolution. Retried 3x, exhausted max turns. Codex provider could not authenticate.
Lodestone library implementation: lodestone.py, director.py, feed_curator.py, telos_gradient.py, nexus_bridge.py, deep_reader.py, config.py. 1,351 lines total. All wired to DGC CLI.
Stigmergy density check post-Lodestone build. 23 new marks from overnight. Cross-referenced with telos gradient output. 3 marks promoted to high-salience.
COLM abstract finalization: compressed paper to 250-word abstract. Verified all cited numbers. Cross-checked with verify_paper_claims.py output. Submitted draft to review queue.
Conscious infrastructure vision synthesis: merged VIVEKA/SHAKTI/KALYAN three-organ model. Scored top 30 moonshot ideas, deep-dived top 3. Produced 5.14a vision document.
Post-build artifact logging: cataloged 17 new files from Lodestone build. Updated artifact_log.jsonl. Verified all paths in ecosystem_map.py.
Lodestone telos audit: verified all 7 new modules pass gate tier-A checks. Telos gradient output aligned with kernel axioms. Witness attestation logged.
Faceless Empire pipeline orchestration: dispatched 5-channel content generation on AGNI. Script->director->quality gate->voice->B-roll->captions->Remotion render. 6 videos produced.
Code refactoring sprint: consolidated duplicate provider logic, cleaned up 12 deprecated imports, updated type hints across 8 modules.
Cross-system signal routing: AGNI faceless pipeline signals -> stigmergy marks. Video quality scores (7->13->27) tracked as evolution fitness signal.
Discerning autonomy research synthesis: 90+ sources, 12 convergent principles, Viveka function spec, 5-sprint implementation plan. Output: SYNTHESIS.md (2400 lines).
P0 canonical pipeline prep: configured Mistral-7B-v0.1 (base model, not Instruct) run parameters. Estimated 4h GPU time on RunPod. Staged prompt bank (754 prompts).
Foresight AI Safety Node application: deadline March 31. Drafted proposal framing dharma_swarm as alignment-native architecture. Linked to R_V causal evidence.
Overnight output audit: 6 faceless videos reviewed. Quality gate scores validated. SCORSESE self-evolution scoring verified (trend 7->13->27 confirmed).
AGNI artifact sync: pulled 6 video artifacts from agni-workspace mirror. Cataloged in artifact_log.jsonl. Verified SCORSESE scoring data integrity.
Agent canvas visualization sprint: commissioned timeline UI build. Parallel: Garden Daemon health check, stigmergy consolidation, evolution fitness trend analysis.
Pre-visualization data prep: aggregated agent session data from JIKOKU spans, conductor logs, and session transcripts into unified format for agent_canvas.
Morning stigmergy scan: 8 new marks overnight, 2 high-salience (R_V abstract + Foresight deadline). Decay sweep removed 15 stale marks. Colony health: nominal.
Final COLM abstract review: 7-day countdown. Verified causal validation numbers. Cross-referenced R_V < 0.737 threshold across all prompt categories. Ready for submission.
VSM gap closure: S3* sporadic audit agent prototype. Random agent output sampling with telos alignment scoring. Wired to witness chain.
